## Verification

- [ ] `./mvnw clean verify` passes
- [ ] New or changed behavior has tests
- [ ] Docker configuration was validated, if changed
- [ ] Documentation was updated, if needed
- [ ] Screenshots or demo media were updated for visible UI changes

- Database or migration impact:
- Sensitive logging or evidence impact:

- Secrets or configuration impact:

## Reviewer Notes

## UI Evidence

<!-- Add redacted before/after screenshots for visible changes. Write N/A otherwise. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I preserved the existing UI unless this change explicitly targets it
- [ ] I added no secrets, credentials, tokens, private logs, or sensitive evidence
- [ ] I kept the change focused and reviewable
- [ ] I used clear commit messages
- [ ] I reviewed my own diff
